name: parallax
title: Parallax
description: Slow horizontal or vertical drift over an image — a lighter, no-zoom complement to KenBurns. Intentionally linear for a constant, calm passage. Built for backgrounds and b-roll.

{
  "name": "parallax",
  "title": "Parallax",
  "description": "Slow horizontal or vertical drift over an image — a lighter, no-zoom complement to KenBurns. Intentionally linear for a constant, calm passage. Built for backgrounds and b-roll.",
